arts.ttl: Three talking points from Barcelona 4-1 Girona
arts.sum: Eric Garcia isn’t a player who gets the plaudits very often but he’s clearly a favourite of Hansi Flick’s and enjoyed a special day on Sunday. 139 - No @LaLigaEN side have ever scored 139 goals after 45 games played in all competitions than the Hans-Dieter Flick's @FCBarcelona in this 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: ‘That’ s what I really love about my team’ - Flick makes Barca admission
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick revealed he absolutely loves his team’s voracious appetite for goals after seeing his men put four past Girona on Sunday . The result means that Barcelona now have 139 goals in 45 games this season, a feat that has never been done before by a La Liga team.
